## What does this PR do?

Describe the change clearly:

## Type of change

- [ ] Regulatory update (new law, amendment, enforcement action)
- [ ] New or improved contract clause
- [ ] New workflow
- [ ] Workflow improvement
- [ ] New jurisdiction coverage
- [ ] Threat model update
- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect guidance, citation error, etc.)
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Other

## Legal authority

If this change involves legal content, cite the specific authority:

- **Regulation/Law:** (e.g., EU AI Act Art. 6, CAIA SB 24-205 Section 3)
- **Source:** (link to official text or reliable source)

## Checklist

- [ ] I've tested this by installing the skill locally and running relevant prompts
- [ ] Legal citations are specific (article, section, regulation number)
- [ ] Risk tags are included where applicable (`LOW` / `MEDIUM` / `HIGH` / `CRITICAL`)
- [ ] Model clause language is provided (not just conceptual advice)
- [ ] Plain English is used (no unnecessary legalese)
- [ ] Escalation triggers are flagged where a real attorney is needed
- [ ] I've read and followed the [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md)

## How to test

Describe how a reviewer can verify this change works correctly:

```
[Example prompt to test with]
```
